title: Biswanath District Bench Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Biswanath District Bench Clerk (Grade-II) Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Biswanath District. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Biswanath District Bench Clerk (Grade-II) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 7 years service in CJM establishment in Assam with at least 2 years as U.D. Assistant/Bench Clerk Grade-III
qualification.details: Must have served not less than 7 years of service in the establishment of the Chief Judicial Magistrate in Assam, out of which at least 2 years continuous service must be as U.D. Assistant (re-designated as Senior Administrative Assistant)/Bench Clerk Grade-III. Preference for experience in Benches of CJM establishment.

salary_details.details: Rs. 14,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- with Grade Pay Rs. 8,000/-

selection_process: Seniority cum Merit ACR Assessment Interview/Viva-Voce
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Biswanath District Bench Clerk (Grade-II) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://biswanath.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Biswanath District Bench Clerk (Grade-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Biswanath District Bench Clerk (Grade-II) recruitment is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) post in the Biswanath District recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 14,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 8,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must have at least 7 years of service in the Chief Judicial Magistrate establishment in Assam, with a minimum of 2 years as U.D. Assistant or Bench Clerk Grade-III. Experience in CJM establishment benches is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Bench Clerk (Grade-II) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Seniority cum Merit, ACR Assessment, and an Interview/Viva-Voce.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for Biswanath District?
faq.answer: The official website for Biswanath District is https://biswanath.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxation benefits mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any information regarding age relaxation.
